name: Cream Filberts
recipeIngredient: granulated sugar or about 60 crushed sugar cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the shortening and sugar.
2. Add the egg and vanilla; mix well.
3. Combine the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt) and add to the creamed mixture. Mix until combined.
4. Roll heaping teaspoonfuls of dough into balls.
5. Press a filbert into each ball and reshape so the dough covers the nut.
6. Place the cookies on ungreased baking sheets.
7. Bake at 375 degrees for 12-15 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Cool on wire racks.
9. Combine the glaze ingredients (confectioner's sugar, water, vanilla extract) in a bowl.
10. Dip each cookie in the glaze.
11. Roll the cookies in granulated sugar or crushed sugar cubes.
Yield: about 5 dozen cookies.
